chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 111 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.383/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.384/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 13.06.2025 1. This urgent application was filed in May 2025; hence, the same has become infructuous and is accordingly dismissed. 2 to 4. Despite issuance of intimation notice, none present, nor has any intimation been received. As per office objection and as held in the case of Abdul Hameed and another v. Province of Sindh through Secretary Home Department and 8 others (PLD 2019 Sindh 168), this petition has been filed without prior approaching the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. In view of the above and the lack of interest shown by the petitioner, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
